refinement_objective: Align ASTRA_ZENITH v2.1 implementation with High-Fidelity FUI Mockup (gemini_desktop_fullscreen_mockup_1774917283108.png)

fx_overlay.gradient_nebula: Deep shifting radial glows in background layers

agent_nodes.status_indication: Glow ring intensity based on 'BUSY' or 'IDLE' state

telemetry_matrix.widget_style: Industrial data cards with ID-label (C-01 to C-06) in top-right
telemetry_matrix.charts: Low-poly area graphs with neon stroke-line and 0.15 fill-alpha

handoff_modal.buttons: Flat, sharp edges, High-contrast cyan/transparent ghost state
